query: SELECT ar.id as adjustment_id, ac.adjustmentRequestId as comment_ref, COUNT(ac.id) as comment_count FROM adjustment_requests ar LEFT JOIN adjustment_comments ac ON ar.id = ac.adjustmentRequestId GROUP BY ar.id, ac.adjustmentRequestId ORDER BY ar.id;
